scripts.render: mkdir -p out && remotion render src/index.ts DailyStencilPack out/daily-stencil-pack.mp4 --props=public/daily-stencil.json
scripts.still: mkdir -p out && remotion still src/index.ts DailyStencilPack out/preview.png --frame=210 --props=public/daily-stencil.json
scripts.render:queued: mkdir -p out && remotion render src/index.ts DailyStencilPack out/daily-stencil-pack.mp4 --props=public/daily-stencil.render.json
